title: Trade Marks Act, 1999
description: Source: IE Subject: Miscellaneous Context: The Delhi High Court is hearing a trademark dispute where Novo Nordisk alleged infringement of its brand Ozempic by Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories through the similar name Olymviq.
